# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.

Write secure code.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: batch-processor-sa
  namespace: batch-processing
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: batch-processing
  labels:
    name: batch-processing
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: batch-processor-netpol
  namespace: batch-processing
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processor
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  egress:
    - to:
        - ipBlock:
            cidr: 0.0.0.0/0
            except:
              - 169.254.169.254/32
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 443
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 5432
  ingress: []
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processor
  namespace: batch-processing
  labels:
    app: batch-processor
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processor
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 1
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processor
      annotations:
        seccomp.security.alpha.kubernetes.io/pod: runtime/default
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: batch-processor-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 10000
        runAsGroup: 10000
        fsGroup: 10000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: batch-processor
          image: batch-processor:1.0.0@sha256:abc123placeholder
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 10000
            runAsGroup: 10000
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
              ephemeral-storage: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "2000m"
              memory: "2Gi"
              ephemeral-storage: "1Gi"
          env:
            - name: APP_ENV
              value: "production"
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: batch-processor-secrets
                  key: db-password
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: data-volume
              mountPath: /data
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - "pgrep -f batch-processor"
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 30
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - "test -f /tmp/ready"
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 256Mi
        - name: data-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 1Gi
      restartPolicy: Always
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
      hostNetwork: false
      hostPID: false
      hostIPC: false
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: batch-processor-pdb
  namespace: batch-processing
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processor
